DECLARATION OF LINDSAY KLINE REGARDING NOTICE AND SETTLEMENT ADMINISTRATION (TRANSACTION ID # 100123349) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCCRAY, MAYA ON BEHALF OF HERSELF, ALL OTHERS SIMILARLY SITUATED, AND THE GENERAL PUBLIC MCCRAY, MAYA ON BEHALF OF HERSELF, ALL OTHERS SIMILARLY SITUATED, AND THE GENERAL PUBLIC, AND AS AN "AGGRIEVED EMPLOYEE" ON BEHALF OF OTHER "AGGRIEVED EMPLOYEES" UNDER THE LABOR CODE PRIVATE ATTORNEYS GENERAL ACT OF 2004

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, MAR-02-2021 FINAL APPROVAL HEARING/HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF MAYA MCCRAY'S MOTION FOR FINAL APPROVAL OF CLASS ACTION SETTLEMENT HELD. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE COURT GRANTS THE MOTION FOR FINAL APPROVAL ON THE CONDITION THAT THE CLASS REPRESENTATIVE ENHANCEMENT PAYMENT BE REDUCED TO $5,000, WITH THE DIFFERENCE TO BE INCLUDED IN THE NET SETTLEMENT AMOUNT TO BE DISTRIBUTED TO CLASS MEMBERS. (SEE, E.G., FRONDA V. STAFFMARK HOLDINGS, INC. (N.D. CAL. JUNE 1, 2018), 2018 WL 2463101, AT *13-*15 [REDUCING REQUESTED SERVICE AWARD FOR CLASS REPRESENTATIVE FROM $10,000 TO $5,000].) THE COURT SCHEDULES A FINAL ACCOUNTING HEARING FOR NOVEMBER 15, 2021 AT 9:30 A.M. IN DEPT. 302. THE PARTIES ARE TO SUBMIT A REPORT TO THE COURT BY NOVEMBER 11, 2021. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER TO THE COURT FOR REVIEW AND SIGNATURE. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR NO. 8600, EMAIL: MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM (302/EPS)

Final Accounting Hearing
Off Calendar Nov-15-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Final Accounting Hearing.

The Court has reviewed the declaration of Lindsay Kline regarding disbursement. Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare a proposed order directing Simpluris to issue the remaining uncashed funds in the amount of $2,073.98 to the State Controller for deposit in the Unclaimed Property Fund in the name of the class member to whom the uncashed check was issued.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-13-2021 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement
Off Calendar Mar-02-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. MARALLE MESSRELIAN, Esq. of the Spivak Law Firm (Tel: 213-725-9094) for plaintiff;
Atty. MARIKO ASHLEY, Esq. of Jackson Lewis P.C. (Tel: 415-394-9400) for defendants.

Hearing Re: Plaintiff Maya McCray's Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement.

The Court's tentative ruling instructed the parties to appear.

Counsel confirm that they have not received any objections to or opt out requests for the settlement.

The Court notes that there is no one present at today's hearing indicating an intent to object to or opt out of the settlement.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The Court grants the motion for final approval on the condition that the class representative enhancement payment be reduced to $5,000, with the difference to be included in the net settlement amount to be distributed to class members. (See, e.g., Fronda v. Staffmark Holdings, Inc. (N.D. Cal. June 1, 2018), 2018 WL 2463101, at *13-*15 [reducing requested service award for class representative from $10,000 to $5,000].)

The Court schedules a Final Accounting Hearing for November 15, 2021 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302. The parties are to submit a report to the Court by November 11, 2021.

Plaintiff's counsel is to prepare and submit a proposed order to the Court for review and signature.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-08-2021 Continued To Apr-27-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Unopposed Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Joint Stipulation Of Class, Collective, And Representative Action Settlement And Release
Off Calendar Oct-08-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Maralle Messrelian for Plaintiff.
Fraser McAlpine for defendant.

DISCUSSED (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF MAYA MCCRAY's Unopposed Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Joint Stipulation Of Class, Collective, And Representative Action Settlement And Release:

Having reviewed the supplemental filings, the Court now grants plaintiff's motion for preliminary approval of the First Amended Joint Stipulation of Class and Representative Action Settlement and Release, conditioned upon the parties making the following minor corrections:

1. Section I(J) [definition of "Court]: delete "the Honorable Teri L. Jackson, presiding." (Former Judge Jackson is now a Justice on the Court of Appeal.)
2. Section III(B)(4) continues to provide that settlement administration costs may increase above the estimate of $15,000 and that "any such additional Settlement Administration Costs will be taken out of the Maximum Settlement Amount." As previously indicated, the Court will not approve this provision; this provision must be conformed to the change to Section III(C).
3. The judge's name (Hon. Ethan P. Schulman), rather than that of Presiding Judge Wong, should appear on the first page of the class notice, and Section VII of the notice should indicate that the final fairness hearing will be held before Judge Schulman in Dept. 302 at 9:30 a.m. on the agreed upon date.
4. Section X of the notice, item (2) should be deleted (the complete court file may be inspected online, but not in person).

Plaintiff to file papers setting Final Approval Hearing for March 2, 2021.

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)

Off Calendar Sep-28-2020 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jan-26-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Unopposed Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Joint Stipulation Of Class, Collective, And Representative Action Settlement And Release
Off Calendar Sep-16-2020 Continued To Oct-08-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

Notice Of Motion And Unopposed Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Joint Stipulation Of Class, Collective, And Representative Action Settlement And Release
Off Calendar Aug-27-2020 Continued To Sep-24-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF MAYA MCCRAY, MAYA MCCRAY's Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Joint Stipulation Of Class, Collective, And Representative Action Settlement And Release.

Plaintiff's motion for preliminary approval of joint stipulation of class, collective, and representative action settlement and release is denied without prejudice, and the hearing is continued to September 24, 2020. No later than September 17, plaintiff shall submit a further factual showing and brief and/or a revised proposed stipulation sufficient to address and resolve the following issues: (see word minutes for full details)
